calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-01-2024 Vacated

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Oleg Cross appeared via zoom for Ellen Kemp (petitioner).
Basil J. Boutris appeared via zoom for and with Sarah Burbidge (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding monies being paid out the trust account, that Mr. Bourtris stated he has paid approximately paid $40,000.00 from the account, and that the evidentiary hearing will cost somewhere near $40,000.00 to $50,000.00. The Court orders that no attorney fees or trust fees are to be paid out of the trust account without a court order, Mr. Boutris and Mr. Cross both acknowledge the order in open court. Case management hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Wan: Not report.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Continued To Dec-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Oleg Cross appeared via zoom for Ellen Kemp (petitioner).
Basil J. Boutris appeared via zoom for Sarah Burbidge (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding evidentiary hearing, that it may take 2 to 3 days, that if settlement offer was in place they would agree to go back to mediation with Betty Epstein, and that there is outstanding discovery in this matter. Case Management hearing is continued to December 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The brief is due one week before the hearing date.
Petition for: (1) Order compelling trustee to provide distributions from the support trust [probate code sec. 16081, 17200]; (2) breach of trust and removal of trustee and appointment of independent successor trustee [probate code sec. 16420] is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on March 04, 2024 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For: (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide Distributions From The Support Trust [Probate Code Sec. 16081, 17200]; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Independent Successor Trustee [Probate Code Sec. 16420]
Off Calendar Oct-09-2023 Continued To Mar-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For: (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide Distributions From The Support Trust [Probate Code Sec. 16081, 17200]; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Independent Successor Trustee [Probate Code Sec. 16420]
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Oct-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Continued To Oct-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Oleg Cross appeared by zoom for Ellen Kemp (petitioner).
Basil Boutris appeared by zoom for and with Sarah Burbidge (trustee) by zoom.

The court stated that it never received the joint case management statement ("CMS"). Mr. Cross stated that they completed one and that they filed it on July 21st in the lower case, but it was delayed because the case was not in the e-file data base. Mr. Cross also provided a summary of what was filed, stated that he will have about six witnesses, that written discovery is still needed, that they participated in mediation, and that no further ADR is needed as mediation was not productive and there are no settlement offers. Mr. Boutris stated that no credible budget was provided, that they were unable to participate in ADR appropriately because they had no budget, that they have to provide for the petitioners remaining lifespan, and that they can't distribute as Mr. Cross would like them to, because the money will run out. Mr. Boutris also stated that additional discovery is needed and that it will be a two to three-day trial. The Petition for Order Compelling Trustee to Provide Distributions from the Support Trust, etc., and the case management hearing are continued to October 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An updated case management statement is to be provided one week prior.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For: (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide Distributions From The Support Trust [Probate Code Sec. 16081, 17200]; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Independent Successor Trustee [Probate Code Sec. 16420]
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Continued To Jul-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Oleg Cross appearing via zoom for Ellen Kemp (petitioner).
Basil Boutris appearing via zoom for and with Sarah Burbidge (respondent) appearing via zoom.
Sarah Newstead (potential fiduciary) appearing via zoom.

Counsel reported that mediation was unsuccessful. Discussion was held regarding setting the matter for trial, the appointment of a neutral professional trustee, the need to conduct discovery/take depositions, the family dynamics, etc. The Court informed counsel that it will issue a case management order which will require them to identify facts that can be stipulated to, any open discovery, any potential motions, to provide a witness list, and file a joint case management statement for the purpose of giving the Court a better understanding of what the trial will look like, etc. The petition for order compelling trustee to provide distribution, etc. is continued to July 31, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A case management hearing is also set for July 31, 2023. Status of mediation is off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For: (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide Distributions From The Support Trust [Probate Code Sec. 16081, 17200]; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Independent Successor Trustee [Probate Code Sec. 16420]
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Continued To Feb-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Continued To Feb-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For: (1) Order Compelling Trustee To Provide
Distributions From The Support Trust [Probate Code Sec. 16081, 17200]; (2) Breach Of Trust And Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Independent Successor Trustee [Probate Code Sec. 16420]
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Continued To Jan-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Oleg Cross, via Zoom, for Ellen Kemp, Petitioner; Basil Boutris, via Zoom, for Sarah Burbidge, Trustee.

Mr. Cross reports of some discovery progress but that the parties appear to be at a standstill and requests that the court set an evidentiary hearing or set this matter for trial. Mr. Cross advises that he suggested mediation, but that opposing counsel did not seem interested and has also suggested appointing a third-party to act as Trustee. Mr. Boutris offers testimony on behalf of his client's position. Counsel presented additional oral argument to support their positions with regard to the petition for order compelling trustee, etc., currently before the court. The court acknowledges counsel's positions and advises that it will consider setting an evidentiary hearing but only after the parties participate in. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Dec-21-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Dec-28-2022. The Parties are to return on Jan-04-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel is instructed to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order to mediation.

The subject matter is continued to Jan-04-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.

Petition For Order (1) Construing Ambiguity In Trust Instrument As To Petitioners Entitlement To Monthly Distributions; And (2) Instructing And Direct
Off Calendar Apr-01-2011 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Kipnis for Ellen Kemp (Petitioner). Thomas Latham for and with Sarah Burbidge (Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order (1) Construing Ambiguity In Trust Instrument As To Petitioners Entitlement To Monthly Distributions; And (2) Instructing And Direct
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To Mar-16-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Latham for and with Sarah Burbidge (Trustee). Steven Barnes for Ellen Kemp.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding discovery, whether there should be extrinsic evidence admitted and ambiguity of the Trust. The matter was continued to March 16, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Written offer of proof by Mr. Barnes is due by March 2, 2011. Response by Mr. Latham, if any, is due by March 11, 2011. Discovery is stayed

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order (1) Construing Ambiguity In Trust Instrument As To Petitioners Entitlement To Monthly Distributions; And (2) Instructing And Direct
Off Calendar Feb-01-2011 Continued To Feb-16-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Howard Kipnis for Ellen Kemp (Petitioner). Tom Latham for and with Sarah Burbidge (Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Court considering the petition without allowing limited discovery, whether the words in the Trust are susceptible to the proposed limitations/multiple interpretations, whether the Court can determine ambiguity on the face without extrinsic review or hearing the surrounding circumstances, and whether there is any basis for an evidentiary hearing. Counsel also spoke of the possibility of mediation. The matter was continued to February 16, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court's review and consideration of the recently filed documents.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
